title: ulmus rotundata
intro: Ulmus rotundata, also known as the Camphor-leaved Elm, is a deciduous tree native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its camphor content. The health benefits of Ulmus rotundata include its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which can aid in wound healing and fighting off infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Ulmus rotundata typically involve making teas or infusions from the leaves and bark, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
